title: microlicia pohliana
intro: Microlicia pohliana is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae, native to the tropical forests of South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Microlicia pohliana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote wound healing. Microlicia pohliana can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
